vision_profile.current_state: Anjali is a final semester BCA student with basic knowledge in C, Java, HTML, and database concepts, but lacks confidence in DSA, algorithmic thinking, and building resume-worthy projects.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Her biggest fear is freezing during technical interviews, which stems from a lack of confidence in her problem-solving and DSA skills.
vision_profile.vision_12mo: Within 12 months, Anjali aims to secure her first private-sector tech job as a Software Developer Trainee, earning 30,000 INR monthly, and becoming a role model for her family.
vision_profile.top_motivation: She is highly motivated to be the first person in her family to achieve a private-sector tech job, driven by a strong desire for personal and family upliftment.

milestones.identity_statement: Let's build a strong foundation in Java and problem-solving, step by step, to boost your confidence!
milestones.market_value_display: Entry-level readiness for basic coding assessments

modules.title: Core Programming Refresher (Java Focus)
modules.description: Strengthen your Java fundamentals and Object-Oriented Programming concepts, essential for any software role.

skills.title: Java Basics & OOP Concepts
skills.description: Understand core Java syntax, data types, variables, and fundamental Object-Oriented Programming principles like classes, objects, inheritance, and polymorphism.

video.title: Java Fundamentals: Variables, Data Types & Operators

scenario.title: Build a Simple Java Calculator Class

skills.title: Control Flow & Functions in Java
skills.description: Learn to control program execution using if-else, loops (for, while), and organize code into reusable functions/methods.

video.title: Mastering Java Loops and Conditional Statements

scenario.title: Implement a Java Program for Prime Number Check

skills.title: Debugging & Error Handling
skills.description: Learn to identify and fix bugs in your code using debugging tools and implement robust error handling mechanisms.

video.title: Effective Debugging in IntelliJ IDEA & Exception Handling

scenario.title: Debug a Java Program with Logical Errors

modules.title: Basic Problem Solving & Logic Building
modules.description: Develop your analytical skills to break down problems and build logical solutions, a core skill for interviews.

skills.title: Introduction to Problem Solving Strategies
skills.description: Learn common approaches like breaking down problems, pattern recognition, and working through examples to solve coding challenges.

video.title: How to Approach Coding Problems: A Beginner's Guide

scenario.title: Solve a Simple Number Pattern Problem

skills.title: Basic Array & String Manipulation
skills.description: Practice common operations on arrays and strings, like searching, reversing, and counting, which are fundamental for DSA.

video.title: Essential Array Operations in Java

scenario.title: Find the Largest Element in an Array

skills.title: Time & Space Complexity Basics
skills.description: Understand how to analyze the efficiency of your code in terms of time and space, crucial for optimizing solutions.

video.title: Introduction to Big O Notation: Time Complexity Explained

scenario.title: Analyze the Complexity of a Given Code Snippet

modules.title: Introduction to Data Structures
modules.description: Get started with fundamental data structures like arrays and strings, and basic searching/sorting algorithms.

skills.title: Arrays & 2D Arrays
skills.description: Deep dive into single and multi-dimensional arrays, their operations, and common use cases in problem-solving.

video.title: Working with Arrays and Matrices in Java

scenario.title: Rotate a 2D Array by 90 Degrees

skills.title: Strings & String Builders
skills.description: Explore advanced string manipulation techniques, immutability, and efficient string operations using StringBuilder.

video.title: Java Strings vs. StringBuilder: When and Why?

scenario.title: Check if a String is a Palindrome

skills.title: Basic Searching & Sorting
skills.description: Learn fundamental algorithms like Linear Search, Binary Search, Bubble Sort, and Selection Sort.

video.title: Introduction to Searching and Sorting Algorithms

scenario.title: Implement Binary Search on a Sorted Array

milestones.identity_statement: Now, let's dive deep into Data Structures and Algorithms to sharpen your problem-solving skills for tough interviews!
milestones.market_value_display: Competitive for coding rounds in product-based companies

modules.title: Advanced Data Structures
modules.description: Master complex data structures like Linked Lists, Trees, Stacks, and Queues, crucial for efficient solutions.

skills.title: Linked Lists
skills.description: Understand singly, doubly, and circular linked lists, their operations, and when to use them over arrays.

video.title: Demystifying Linked Lists: Concepts and Implementations

scenario.title: Reverse a Singly Linked List

skills.title: Stacks & Queues
skills.description: Learn about LIFO and FIFO data structures, their applications, and implement them using arrays or linked lists.

video.title: Stacks and Queues: Data Structures for Order

scenario.title: Implement a Queue using Two Stacks

skills.title: Trees & Binary Trees
skills.description: Understand hierarchical data structures like trees, binary trees, and their traversals (inorder, preorder, postorder).

video.title: Introduction to Trees and Binary Tree Traversals

scenario.title: Find the Height of a Binary Tree

modules.title: Core Algorithms & Time Complexity
modules.description: Explore essential algorithms and advanced complexity analysis to write optimized and efficient code.

skills.title: Recursion & Backtracking
skills.description: Master recursive problem-solving, understand the call stack, and apply backtracking for combinatorial problems.

video.title: Recursion Explained: From Basics to Backtracking

scenario.title: Generate All Permutations of a String using Backtracking

skills.title: Hashing & Hash Maps
skills.description: Understand hash functions, collision resolution, and efficiently store/retrieve data using HashMaps/HashSets.

video.title: Hashing and HashMaps in Java: A Deep Dive

scenario.title: Find Duplicate Elements in an Array using a HashMap

skills.title: Greedy Algorithms
skills.description: Learn to solve optimization problems by making locally optimal choices at each step, hoping to find a global optimum.

video.title: Introduction to Greedy Algorithms with Examples

scenario.title: Solve the Activity Selection Problem using Greedy Approach

modules.title: Practical Algorithmic Problem Solving
modules.description: Apply advanced algorithms like Dynamic Programming and Graphs to solve complex problems, preparing you for real challenges.

skills.title: Dynamic Programming Basics
skills.description: Learn to solve problems by breaking them into overlapping subproblems and storing results to avoid recomputation.

video.title: Dynamic Programming: The Art of Optimization

scenario.title: Solve the Fibonacci Sequence using Dynamic Programming

skills.title: Graphs & Graph Traversal
skills.description: Understand graph representations (adjacency list/matrix) and traversal algorithms like BFS and DFS.

video.title: Graphs: Representation and Traversal (BFS/DFS)

scenario.title: Implement Breadth-First Search (BFS) on a Graph

skills.title: Advanced Sorting & Searching
skills.description: Explore efficient sorting algorithms like Merge Sort, Quick Sort, and advanced searching techniques.

video.title: Merge Sort and Quick Sort: Divide and Conquer

scenario.title: Implement Merge Sort Algorithm
